prerequisites.value: Cha 13, Shield Focus, Weapon Focus ( longsword ), base attack bonus +2.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using this style and wielding a longsword and a light or heavy shield, you gain a +1 bonus on Reflex and Will saving throws. In addition, when you enter the Sisterhood Style stance, you can choose a teamwork feat you have. As a swift action, you can grant that feat to an ally within 10 feet until the beginning of your next turn.
